<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=GaiadToday for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#invoke:GaiadDate|today
 | anchor   = {{{anchor|12-21}}}
 | months   = {{{months|Capricorn,Aquarius,Pisces,Aries,Taurus,Gemini,Cancer,Leo,Virgo,Libra,Scorpio,Sagittarius,Ophiuchus}}}
 | weekdays = {{{weekdays|Sun,Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat}}}
}}
<noinclude>[[Category:git synced pages]]
[[Category:Templates missing wikidata]]
</noinclude>
